infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CardioDil AI uses the camera to analyze your meals for cardiac health scoring.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CardioDil AI accesses your photo library so you can select meal images for analysis.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: CardioDil AI reads your heart rate, HRV, SpO2, steps, and sleep data to calculate your daily Heart Score.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: CardioDil AI does not write health data.

plugins.photosPermission: CardioDil AI accesses your photos to analyze meal images.
